expectations.evidence: Explicitly shows 'export ZENDNNL_MATMUL_ALGO=1' and explains it selects the 'Blocked AOCL DLP' algorithm

expectations.text: Recommends BF16 format as ideal for ZenDNN on Zen 5
expectations.evidence: Extensively explains BF16 is ideal, references _mm512_dpbf16_ps instruction, and explains ZenDNN only accelerates FP32/BF16

expectations.text: Recommends using physical core count (16 cores) for thread count
expectations.evidence: Recommends '-t 16' matching physical core count, explains HT degrades performance
